Notice Of Motion To Quash Medical Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Luke VanderDrift, Esq. of Tobener Law Center (415-504-2165), counsel for plaintiff/moving party
Jennifer L. Sommer, Esq. of Law Offices of Mark R Mittelman, PC (925-256-0679), counsel for defendant/moving party

Court orders parties to meet, confer and try to resolve issues. After coferring in the hallway the partie report a partial agreement. The motion is then called for hearing and argued by both sides. Court rules now as follows:

PLAINTIFFS MARIA GARCIA and DENIS GARCIA'S Motion To Quash Medical Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions is DENIED. Court orders compliance by Kaiser by January 9, 2015. Written stipulation and order is filed in open court.

Notice Of Motion To Quash Medical Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions

Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
